name: FEMLab.jl Codespace
updateContentCommand: julia --startup-file=no --project=${containerWorkspaceFolder} -e 'using Pkg; println("Project: ", Base.active_project()); println("Depot: ", DEPOT_PATH); Pkg.instantiate(); Pkg.precompile(); @time using FEMLab; println("FEMLab prebuild ready.")'
postAttachCommand: echo 'FEMLab.jl Codespace ready. Open Julia and run: using FEMLab'
